feedItems.description: allocated £7.7m to Environment & Streets (≈£66 per resident)
allocated £2.8m to Council Running Costs (≈£23 per resident)
allocated £4.3m to Culture & Leisure (≈£36 per resident)
allocated £2.5m to Planning & Development (≈£21 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £103 (4.8%) to £2232
